title: Sitemap Safe/Unsafe Verdict
reason: Technically the sitemap is SITEMAP_SAFE (97.5% clean). But content-wise, 350+ thin tool/guide pages dilute the quality signal. The sitemap is SAFE from a technical perspective but NEEDS_PRUNING from a content quality perspective.

categories_intentionally_indexable.actual: PARTIAL — guides and tools are thin but indexable

no_major_bloat.actual: PARTIAL — 350 thin pages constitute content bloat, not technical bloat

if_we_remove_3_polluted_urls: SITEMAP_SAFE for technical checks. Content bloat is a strategic decision, not a safety issue.
recommendation: Fix 3 polluted URLs (1 404 + 2 noindex contradictions), then the sitemap is TECHNICALLY safe. Content bloat (guides + tools) requires a strategic decision about page value, not an emergency fix.
